reviews.review_title: i'm gonna tell you why i hate this game
reviews.review_description: i should have seen this as a red flag because they started their update mid school year and today was my last day of school and it's still not out if you're gonna release it release it now or i will be deleting this game and never installing it ever again i don't care if it comes out i don't care i don't care a million times i don't care into those of you who sees this after 2 days please delete this game because i am done with this game add a few see this message and all the other bad reviews you will see why you should delete the game if you already installed it

OK so i get that people are saying that coding takes time and if you want the game to be good you have to be patient but there should at least be more play tests because i never got to play the game before it got stopped to be updated while my friend says that this game is really fun so all i want is a play test to see what this game is really about

Hear me out i know that people are saying that the game sucks because it's not released, but the game is amazing so im not gonna complain at all. but just a suggestion, could you guys release it? I mean the game is honestly great so i love it and all the people that played knows that too! So my point is, that the game looked finished and perfectly polished from the start so i was surprised to see it was only a playtest!! So guys just release it so we all can enjoy the masterpiece together🤝

reviews.review_title: Devs pretty much abandoned this game
reviews.review_description: Can't play it. It's been down for months. Devs pretty much abandoned this game. 1 star. Could've been fun was fun actually. But now it's unplayable and abandoned

developer_response.body:
We can assure you that we have not abandoned the game, we're taking extra measures to ensure that it is perfect upon release. You can stay up to date with us over at https://discord.gg/squido

We will return!

reviews.review_description: I can not believe that its been 6 months since this game was activate, tbh I believe this game should NEVER be online again, cuz even if it went back online then it would flop SO fast. Just delete the game bro, no one cares abt it now

Great game my favorite by far  ￼ out of any games on quest but it’s been under development for eight months now eight months ago there was a play test for two days. That’s it besides that the game has been unplayable forever  they just need to do more play tests ￼￼￼

the game let you play and then it'll just show another update and it will go back to playing and then i'll show another update and now this update has been going on since December 13th and it's almost April 2026 whoever made this game is a is a freaking idiot

It used to be SO good and I would grind for hours and I loved it but they threw that away after lying to their community and ragebaiting them, they said it would be out before 2026, and I get that it's a small team but the playtests played completely fine and I would've understood a month or little more to work on it. They've been working on it for 8 months, it's sad to see such a high potential vr game get thrown away and pretty much seeming ignored by the devs.

this game is a scam when i enter no game just text that says its "shut down" and the videos on youtube say "i DoNt tHiNk yOu GuYs WaNt mE rEaLeAsE tHe GaMe" and they post videos like this to over hype the game and its stupid. And people spent $30 on bundles in this game just to never play again. so dont download this game just a waste of time

developer_response.body:
As  we've mentioned in our meta horizon posts as-well as in game we've temporarily shut the game down as "early access" has ended and we're working on releasing the full game, the guy you are seeing on youtube is trace our social media manager simply keeping the game relevant & attracting new players for when we actually release.

You WILL be able to play the game again soon, patience is key otherwise we'd just end up releasing a completely unfinished game.

You can stay up to date over at https://discord.gg/squido

- HazBeann

I am convinced that this update is going to be bad i don't even think it will be good or they are gonna make you have to pay for the game

developer_response.body:
As stated in our horizon posts, discord as-well as in game we've temporarily taken the game down as "early access testing" is now over and we're working on releasing the full game!

We will return you can stay up to date over at https://discord.gg/squido

- HazBeann

We will return, as mentioned in many of our developer posts. We're working on releasing the full version of the game! Many things will have changed alongside lots of new additions

reviews.review_title: Modders and you can never play the game

the game was good at first but after the game shut down some guy on youtube keeps on saying LOOKs like yall dont want the game out and everyone keeps saying bring the game out.

developer_response.body:
The guy on YouTube is Trace, our social media manager simply generating hype for the game when it goes into full release. As mentioned many times "early access testing" is now over and we're working on the full release but in the meantime, servers must remain closed as we have to play around with lots of stuff in our backend to get things working smoothly!

Stay updated here https://discord.gg/squido

- HazBeann
